reasoning: Lactate clearance and fatigue resistance are crucial to improve your 20-min power and close the gap in your power curve. Your last ride was in a recovery phase, setting you up perfectly for focused work today. Using Emigration Canyon for this will prepare you for the climb intensity of the Alpine Loop.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: Over-unders at 10 minutes (5 min @ 209-223W, 5 min @ 242-256W) repeated 3 times with 2-minute recovery spins in between.

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
